headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk (routine capex, not event-driven loss) — JSW Energy expands renewable portfolio with 85 MW addition, total capacity reaches 13.3 GW
what_matters: BRSR, CDP, GRI, TCFD frameworks triggered; no new deadlines or penalties.
No immediate P/E impact; negligible margin or revenue effect.
No material change in cost of capital; green financing eligibility incrementally improved.
